sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: Teachers can view only their assigned lessons. They can update the lesson status (Attended, No-show), save a lesson summary, and input homework. Changes are persisted on the lesson record.
sys_app_requirement.description: Provide a backend workspace (native UI) for teachers with the admin role to manage their assigned lessons. Required actions: update lesson status (e.g., Attended, No-show), input a lesson summary (what was discussed), and input assigned homework. This workspace is not accessible from the student portal.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-006: Teacher Lesson Management Workspace
